title: Error Set Composition and Handling
description: Implement a file parser that demonstrates Zig's error set composition, error union types, and idiomatic error handling patterns.
requirements: Define custom error sets: ParseError, FileError, ValidationError
Use errdefer for cleanup on error paths
Implement error payloads using error.* pattern
Use catch to convert errors appropriately
Handle all errors explicitly (no catch unreachable)

few_shot_examples.prompt: Use errdefer for cleanup on error.
